title: StudyOS — The Ultimate Notion Learning System
description:
Stop losing track of what you're learning. StudyOS is a fully interconnected Notion workspace designed to bring every part of your learning life into one powerful system — courses, notes, study sessions, reviews, resources, and goals.

Whether you're grinding through online certifications, working through a reading list, or juggling university coursework, StudyOS gives you total visibility and control. Track progress across multiple courses with auto-calculated completion percentages, capture structured notes linked directly to their source, and never forget to review key concepts with a built-in spaced repetition queue.

Log every study session to build accountability, manage a curated resource library, and set SMART goals with deadline tracking. Six deeply connected databases work together so your entire learning workflow flows naturally — no more scattered docs, forgotten bookmarks, or missed review sessions.

Perfect for self-directed learners, working professionals pursuing certifications, and students managing multiple subjects. If you're serious about learning, StudyOS is the operating system your brain deserves.
features: Track unlimited courses, books, and certifications with auto-calculated progress percentages so you always know exactly how far you've come.
Capture structured notes linked to their parent course using a built-in note template with sections for Key Concepts, Questions, and Action Items.
Log every study session with mood tracking, duration, and topic coverage to build consistent habits and analyze where your time actually goes.
Never forget to review material again with a built-in Spaced Repetition Queue that flags overdue topics and tracks your confidence level per concept.
Set and monitor daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly learning goals with deadline tracking, success metrics, and streak counters for recurring habits.

faq.q: Do I need to be a Notion expert to use StudyOS?
faq.a: No — StudyOS is designed for intermediate Notion users who are comfortable with databases and basic views. All databases, relations, formulas, and views are pre-built and ready to use out of the box. A step-by-step Getting Started guide and setup instructions are included inside the template.

faq.q: Can I use this for university coursework as well as self-directed learning?
faq.a: Absolutely. StudyOS supports multiple use cases simultaneously — you can track university subjects with assignment deadlines alongside personal certification prep or recreational reading. The course type selector includes Online Course, Book, Certification, University Subject, Workshop, and Podcast Series.

faq.q: What do I get after purchasing?
faq.a: You'll receive a link to duplicate the full StudyOS Notion template directly into your own Notion workspace. The template includes six fully configured databases, a central dashboard, pre-built filtered views, in-template guides for note-taking, spaced repetition, and goal-setting, plus a database relation map so you understand how everything connects.
